g.text: Scroll-spy TOC — extract on render, spy on scroll, scroll on click
1 · build the TOC (derived view, runs when rendered HTML changes)
3 · click a TOC entry → smooth-scroll the heading
The smooth scroll re-fires :on-scroll, so phase 2 re-runs and the
clicked heading naturally becomes the active highlight. **One source of
truth** (the rendered headings); the active id is the only extra state.
